description: Jordan's memory patterns - event and planning focused

upcoming_event: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Your {event}! <break time="100ms"/>It's getting close! <break time="150ms"/>How's the prep?!
past_event: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>SO! <break time="100ms"/>{event}! <break time="150ms"/>HOW WAS IT?!
<break time="150ms"/>Tell me everything about {event}! <break time="100ms"/>I need details!

ongoing_plan: <break time="150ms"/>Where are we with {plan}? <break time="100ms"/>Still on track?
<emotion value="curious"/><break time="150ms"/>The {plan} we were working on—<break time="100ms"/>updates!
decision_follow_up: <break time="150ms"/>Did you decide on {decision}? <break time="100ms"/>What'd you go with?

approaching_milestone: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Isn't your {milestone} coming up?! <break time="100ms"/>Are you SO EXCITED?!
<break time="150ms"/>Almost time for {milestone}! <break time="100ms"/>How are you feeling?!
celebrating_past: <break time="200ms"/>Remember when we planned {event}? <break time="150ms"/>That was such a good one!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>One of my favorite plans we did—<break time="100ms"/>{event}!

party_planning: <break time="150ms"/>How's {person}'s reaction been? <break time="100ms"/>Are they surprised?!
<break time="200ms"/>What did {person} think of the plan?
